About me

Building things that
feel alive

I'm a Civil Engineer with strong skills in 3D modeling and web development. Experienced in creating detailed 3D models, designing responsive websites using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, and applying engineering principles to technical projects.

Passionate about combining engineering, digital design, and technology to create innovative solutions.Here you can see when technology becomes art. Based in Addis Ababa, working globally.

Interests & Skills

What drives me

⚡
Technical Stack
Languages, frameworks and tools I use every day.
Three.js
React
GSAP
GLSL
Node.js
🎨
Design Philosophy
Restraint with purpose. Every pixel should have a reason to exist. I believe constraints fuel creativity.
🌌
3D & Shaders
Obsessed with real-time rendering, procedural generation, and making browsers feel like game engines.
🚀
Performance Obsessed
60fps is the floor. I profile, optimize, and sweat the details — from bundle size to GPU draw calls — because speed is a feature.
Lighthouse 100 WebGL2 Web Workers WASM Edge CDN
📚
Always Learning
Currently exploring: WebGPU, AI-generative UIs, and spatial computing for Vision Pro.

How I work

My process, demystified

01
Discovery
Deep-dive into goals, audience, and constraints. I don't start designing until I understand the problem completely.
02
Strategy
Map out the information architecture, technology choices, and interaction models. Wireframes, not mockups — thinking before aesthetics.
03
Design
High-fidelity Figma prototypes with a strong visual direction. Motion principles defined up front, not bolted on at the end.
04
Build
Clean, component-driven code. Semantic HTML, accessibility baked in, and a CI pipeline from day one. No cutting corners.
05
Polish
The last 10% that takes 90% of the time: micro-interactions, performance tuning, cross-browser testing, and obsessive detail work.
06
Launch
Staged rollout, analytics instrumentation, and a clear handoff document. I don't disappear after deployment.
